All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

B

behavioralStrategyPattern - package behavioralStrategyPattern
The behavioralStrategyPattern package contains classes and interfaces for implementing the Strategy design pattern.

C

CategorySearchStrategy - Class in behavioralStrategyPattern
The CategorySearchStrategy class implements the SearchStrategy interface.
CategorySearchStrategy() - Constructor for class behavioralStrategyPattern.CategorySearchStrategy
 

N

NameSearchStrategy - Class in behavioralStrategyPattern
The NameSearchStrategy class implements the SearchStrategy interface.
NameSearchStrategy() - Constructor for class behavioralStrategyPattern.NameSearchStrategy
 

S

search(List<Product>, String) - Method in class behavioralStrategyPattern.CategorySearchStrategy
Searches for products that belong to the specified category.
search(List<Product>, String) - Method in class behavioralStrategyPattern.NameSearchStrategy
Searches for products whose names contain the specified query.
search(List<Product>, String) - Method in interface behavioralStrategyPattern.SearchStrategy
Searches a list of products based on a specific query.
SearchStrategy - Interface in behavioralStrategyPattern
The SearchStrategy interface defines a contract for implementing different strategies to search through a list of products based on a specific query.
